visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with round glasses and a flat gray cap sits against a gradient orange and purple background. He gestures broadly with his hands while a graphic of a silver Tesla Cybertruck and large text overlays appear. (2) The scene shifts to a bright retail store interior where the man holds up two pink smartphone boxes in front of a shelf filled with various mobile devices. (3) The man returns to the studio setting, speaking with an expressive face. Grainy night-time footage of a crashed vehicle on fire is shown, accompanied by cartoonish illustrations of beer mugs and flames. (4) Close-up shots of the Cybertruck's side profile appear with red circles highlighting the B and C pillars. A technical diagram follows, illustrating a hidden compartment under a trim panel with an arrow pointing to a manual release cable. (5) Footage shows a silver truck in a garage environment where a heavy weight wrapped in blue fabric is swung against the side window multiple times, failing to shatter it. The man continues speaking in a small inset or cutback to the studio.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko米可手機館. [Slogan]: 手機破盤價，米可發很大!. [Slogan]: Cybertruck. (2) [Variety]: 致命的設計. (3) [Slogan]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (4) [Subtitle]: 2024年11月加州發生一起Cybertruck. [Variety]: 酒駕自撞起火. (5) [Subtitle]: 4人受困車內只有一人獲救. [Subtitle]: 這場車禍讓Cybertruck車門設計引起了關注. (6) [Subtitle]: 需要透過按壓車門外的B柱與C柱上的按鈕才能打開. (7) [Subtitle]: 當事故造成車輛失去電力的時候. (8) [Variety]: 無法透過按壓按鈕打開車門. [Variety]: (受困者在車內). (9) [Subtitle]: 只能從內部改用手動開關開啟車門. (10) [Subtitle]: 而手動開關的這個位置大部分人應該都不知道在哪吧. (11) [Subtitle]: 因為它隱藏在車內裝飾板下難以發現並啟用. (12) [Subtitle]: 更不用說車內乘客已經失去了意識. (13) [Subtitle]: 從車外的部分你打不開車門也破不了Cybertruck這個防禦力很強的車窗也造成了救人的難度提升.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) speaking, and an unidentified person's hands holding phone boxes in the store.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged Asian man wearing a green t-shirt, round-rimmed glasses, and a flat gray textured cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a studio with a purple and orange gradient. Secondary backgrounds include a bright mobile phone shop with shelves of devices, and a night-time street scene with a burning car.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks rapidly and with high energy. The background music is an upbeat, electronic pop track with a steady percussive beat. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as text appears on screen. The vocal tone is persuasive and narrative. (3) The sound of a distant siren and crackling fire textures the audio as the narrator describes a car crash. The music continues at a consistent volume. (4) Distinct mechanical 'click' sound effects are synchronized with the visual highlighting of the truck's buttons. The narrator's pitch rises for emphasis. (5) Heavy, dull thudding and percussive impact sounds occur repeatedly as a weight hits the glass in the visual. The narrator concludes with a serious, informative tone over the ongoing BGM.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Technical Explanation -> Risk Assessment
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To analyze and critique the safety design of the Tesla Cybertruck's electronic door handles, highlighting how they can trap passengers during power failures and complicate rescue efforts due to shatter-resistant windows.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker mentions buying phones at 'miko' and shows the store interior and brand logos prominently in the corner and a specific segment.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video combines a fast-paced social media editing style with technical investigative commentary. The contrast between the upbeat BGM and the grim subject matter of a fatal crash creates high engagement.
